data.four_set_effect: Increases Swirl DMG by 60%. Decreases opponent's Elemental RES to the element infused in the Swirl by 40% for 10s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A proud crown that once belonged to the Viridescent Venerer. It is as lush and green as the breezes of the wild.
circlet_of_logos.title: Viridescent Venerer's Diadem

flower_of_life.desc: A wild flower that was once a ubiquitous sight in its homeland. It was picked by a hunter who wore it on their chest.
flower_of_life.title: In Remembrance of Viridescent Fields

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A water pouch used by the Viridescent Venerer. Its capacity is much greater than one would expect.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Viridescent Venerer's Vessel

plume_of_death.desc: The fletching of an arrow that once pierced right through its prey, but somehow still remains spotless.
plume_of_death.title: Viridescent Arrow Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: A wondrous instrument that a hunter once wore. It forever points towards their prey.
sands_of_eon.title: Viridescent Venerer's Determination

list.desc: A white wild flower that used to cover the earth.</br>It has not withered one bit, and still gives off an exquisite fragrance.</br>In the days when wildlife still roamed the earth and monsters had not yet appeared,</br>the Viridescent Venerer would use this flower to conceal her human scent.</br>Thus it was said that to seek the silent and gentle Viridescent Venerer,</br>one simply need to close one's eyes and walk barefoot through the forest, following the subtle fragrance of wild flowers.</br>Only those who could tread as softly as a hunter could avoid making the leaves crackle underfoot, alerting the queen of hunters to their presence.</br>It was also said that the one who eventually found the hunter was a boy.</br>At that time, disaster had just befallen the ancient kingdom and misery was spreading across the land.</br>
list.title: In Remembrance of Viridescent Fields

list.desc: A hunter's hat without any blood stains.</br>In folklore, it belonged to the uncrowned queen of hunters — the Viridescent Venerer.</br>"Never become the foe of the earth and the forest." This was the hunters' rule.</br>Instead, a hunter should become a silent part of nature.</br>It is said that a bird once built its nest in this hat.</br>None could ever bestow a crown upon the queen of hunters,</br>since the only one superior to her was nature itself.</br>In the crisis that soon followed, her hunter's hat became</br>a frightful sight for monsters to behold.</br>
list.title: Viridescent Venerer's Diadem

list.desc: A very robust and leakproof vessel.</br>A legendary hunter known as the Viridescent Venerer once used it to collect whispers by the campfire.</br>One night, the Viridescent Venerer picked up the scent of other human beings.</br>As a hunter, she feared neither wolf packs nor monsters.</br>What she feared far more than this was joining the chatter by the campfire.</br>For she had long forgotten how to speak human language.</br>Even after rejoining the humans and accepting her place as Viridescent Venerer, no one ever heard her say a single word.</br>Similarly, no one ever saw her leave a single trace behind.</br>The Viridescent Venerer collected the laughter she heard that night and stored it in her vessel.</br>For many years, she would listen back to the voices in the vessel whenever she felt lonely.</br>
list.title: Viridescent Venerer's Vessel

list.desc: A glossy and shining feather of a falcon. It once served as a fine fletching on one of the Viridescent Venerer's arrows.</br>In the past, when the Viridescent Venerer's arrow hit its target,</br>she would come down and stroke the fur of her prey gently until its life force returned to nature in peace.</br>For she knew that one day, she too would embark on a journey to the place where the souls of her prey rested.</br>The Viridescent Venerer believed that at the end of her life, she would wake up from reality,</br>and be reunited with the departed at an endless hunting ground.</br>But she also believed that the moment her arrow pierced through the monster that had killed the boy,</br>that endless hunting ground at the end of her life was gone from her grasp.</br>For she killed that mutated monster not for the sake of survival,</br>but out of vengeance and suffering.</br>
list.title: Viridescent Arrow Feather

list.desc: A delicate device used for wayfinding.</br>Legend has it that when the Viridescent Venerer walked barefoot on the fields,</br>the grass beneath her feet would tell her what the birds in the trees could see,</br>and the mud she trod on would tell her what the roots in the earth could hear.</br>But it is said that ever since disaster struck, the grass and trees never spoke again.</br>For the God of the Woods had died in the disaster.</br>Since then, she relied on this device for direction when hunting.</br>At the request of a boy she encountered, she ceased hunting birds and beasts.</br>Instead, she made the monsters that brought destruction and suffering her prey.</br>
list.title: Viridescent Venerer's Determination
